news.title: ‘Atomic snapshots’ of proofreading enzyme could lead to better COVID-19 drugs
news.summary_en: An Iowa State University scientist used images from a cryogenic electron microscope to better understand why a common type of antiviral drug struggles to fight off the virus that causes COVID-19, findings that will guide designs for more effective treatment.

news.title: Innovation at Work: 2026 By the Numbers
news.summary_en: Iowa State's entrepreneurial spirit has spread across campus and the state helping launch new startups, grow small businesses and develop a future workforce. The numbers illustrate the impact of this work.
